prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: db_1940 Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: 20pk ASR Tactical Zip Tie Handcuff Set Description: Protect yourself by having the right tools at hand when you need them. The ASR Tactical Zip-Cuffs are a one-time use disposable restraint that can be used on any extremity; arms or feet. Designed to be light weight, ultra-portable, and nearly unbreakable, each handcuff has a max diameter of 3.5 inches and is constructed of heavy duty 2.5mm injection molded plastic.

This pack of zip tie handcuffs is great for personal security and protection. Each handcuff measures 27" in length and is constructed of heavy duty plastic, ensuring your captive will stay secure.

The zip ties are .5" wide and 2.5mm thick, making them very strong. This is a great pack to keep around the house, in your garage or bug out bag for emergencies.

Package Includes:
-(20) Heavy Duty Zip Tie Handcuffs Search Terms: escape tools Features: - 20 Pack Zip Tie Handcuffs - Constructed of Heavy Duty Plastic - Dimensions: 27" x .5"; 2.5mm Thick - Maximum Locked Diameter: 3.5" Per Side === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical 20-pk Zip Tie Handcuff Set

openai.item_name: ASR Tactical 20-pk Zip Tie Handcuff Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Heavy Duty Plastic, 27 Inches Long, One-Time Use Disposable, Ultra-Portable, Personal Security And Emergency Restraints

openai.title_differentiation: 20 Pack, Heavy Duty Plastic, 27 Inch Length, 35 Inch Max Diameter, One Time Use, Lightweight, Portable
